configure.what_is_this_open_text: WHAT IS THIS? Fluxy base URL must be the WebDev Flux endpoint, usually ending in /system/webdev/flux. Do not use the Ignition gateway admin URL. The stored token indicator only means a write-only token exists; Flux never renders the token value. Ignition version text comes from Fluxy getVersion, and the parenthesized b... value is Ignition's build identifier. Bridge configuration docs

detail.build_string_title: Ignition version/build reported by Fluxy getVersion. The b-number is Ignition's build identifier.

charts_path_pagination.first_page_text: FLUX.CHARTS.PATHS Available Flux.charts Paths 70 PATHS Current Flux.charts surfaces and configured chart profiles. This list is paginated to keep stress imports scan-friendly while preserving the rotating Navigation Wells surface. Historical Tag Charts /charts/ · Built-in Generic historical trend from recent numeric runtime samples. OPEN Live Charts /charts/live/ · Built-in Right-edge-follow trend that polls fresh runtime samples. OPEN Navigation Well Charts /charts/wells/ · Built-in Rotating multi-well cached trace surface. OPEN Fluxolot Fishtank Charts /charts/fluxolot/ · Built-in Fluxolot proof surface cycling Sir and Missus tanks. dashboard_detail.text: FLUX.CHARTS Charts 66 CHARTS Dashboard detail intentionally avoids rendering every chart link. Use the chart index or the rotating Navigation Wells surface for large imported sets. Navigation wells Generic rotating well chart endpoint for stress/load review OPEN Chart index 66 chart profiles · 66 signals OPEN ↖ [↘] ⚙

configure.replace_checkbox_label_text: Replace existing cards for imported scopes Updates the imported scope definitions without deleting runtime values.

detail.text: FLUX.LIVE Stale tag recovery 3 STALE Refresh stale runtime tags with one consolidated Fluxy block read. Legacy source-missing rows are preserved and labeled separately instead of being deleted or mixed into normal stale-refresh triage. Cleanup Sample / Sample Flow No read recorded Source [default]Cleanup/Sample/Flow · [default] Production runtime STALE Demo Area Tank / Tank Level Last read older than 120s · 314s old Source [default]Demo Area/Tank/Level · [default] Production runtime STALE Legacy Meter / Level Bad quality: Error_Configuration("Server \"Flux Field\" does not exist.") · 14s old Source [default]Legacy/Meter/Level · [default] Production runtime Legacy cleanup candidate: the stored runtime tag points at the missing Flux Field provider. Source rows are preserved for later data cleanup. LEGACY SOURCE MISSING ↖ [↘] ⚙

sim_config.text: FLUX.SIM Runtime Connection 2/3 OPC SERVERS STORED RUNNING SimServer endpoints are the running OPC side of Flux.sim and are supervised by Flux.serve. Status here is stored endpoint state plus last heartbeat evidence; OS process truth belongs to Flux.serve. 3 configured device namespaces, 5 field tags · latest heartbeat May 24, 2026, 10:27 p.m. legacy-flux-field stored running · stale heartbeat · 1 device namespaces · 1 tags · seen 433s ago Heartbeat field-agent:legacy · PID 54321 Port 5062 · host 127.0.0.1 opc.tcp://127.0.0.1:5062/flux/legacy local-field stored disabled · no heartbeat · 1 device namespaces · 3 tags Port 4840 · host 0.0.0.0 opc.tcp://0.0.0.0:4840/flux/field sir-fluxolot-fishtank stored running · fresh heartbeat · 1 device namespaces · 1 tags · seen 13s ago Heartbeat field-agent:sir · PID 12345 Port 5061 · host 0.0.0.0 opc.tcp://0.0.0.0:5061/flux/field CONFIGURE OPC server runtime Runtime controls use stored endpoint status. Check Flux.serve evidence before treating stored running as process truth. legacy-flux-field stored running · stale heartbeat · PID 54321 · port 5062 · opc.tcp://127.0.0.1:5062/flux/legacy ■ STOP local-field stored disabled · no heartbeat · port 4840 · opc.tcp://0.0.0.0:4840/flux/field ▶ START sir-fluxolot-fishtank stored running · fresh heartbeat · PID 12345 · port 5061 · opc.tcp://0.0.0.0:5061/flux/field ■ STOP ↖ ↘ [⚙]
